responses:
theorem Topology.P3_of_P2 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A : Set X) → Topology.P3 A :=
by
  intro hP2
  have hMono : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    Set.interior_mono (Set.closure_mono Set.interior_subset)
  exact hP2.trans hMono

theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 (A := A) → P3 (A := A) := by
  intro hP2
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    have hcl : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A :=
      closure_mono (interior_subset : interior A ⊆ A)
    exact interior_mono hcl
  exact subset_trans hP2 hsubset
